title: Rootless containers do not start due to pasta failing after reboot
body:
### Issue Description

I have set up some rootless containers that I am trying to start using  the user-level `podman-restart.service` and `loginctl enable-linger`. They fail to start due to a pasta issue.
Log after rebooting:
```
Jul 25 22:26:34 horizon systemd[997]: Starting Podman Start All Containers With Restart Policy Set To Always...
Jul 25 22:26:34 horizon podman[1036]: time="2024-07-25T22:26:34+02:00" level=info msg="/usr/bin/podman filtering at log level info"

Jul 25 22:26:34 horizon podman[1054]: time="2024-07-25T22:26:34+02:00" level=info msg="Using sqlite as database backend"

Jul 25 22:26:34 horizon podman[1054]: Error: unable to start container "dec65072d5b554bb8c43ae1932de71db460ea19ccf06d38434d110ef29324c2f": setting up Pasta: pasta failed with exit code 1:

Jul 25 22:26:34 horizon podman[1054]: External interface not usable

Jul 25 22:26:34 horizon systemd[997]: podman-restart.service: Failed with result 'exit-code'.
Jul 25 22:26:34 horizon systemd[997]: Failed to start Podman Start All Containers With Restart Policy Set To Always.
```

Log after manually entering `systemctl --user restart podman-restart` (everything works)

```

Jul 25 22:28:25 horizon podman[1334]: 2024-07-25 22:28:25.974329475 +0200 CEST m=+0.892211976 container start dec65072d5b554bb8c43ae1932de71db460ea19ccf06d38434d110ef29324c2f (image=docker.io/library/mysql:8, name=radius-db, pod_id=0bd>

Jul 25 22:28:26 horizon radius-db[1632]: 2024-07-25 20:28:26+00:00 [Note] [Entrypoint]: Entrypoint script for MySQL Server 8.4.2-1.el9 started.
Jul 25 22:28:26 horizon podman[1334]: time="2024-07-25T22:28:26+02:00" level=info msg="Got Conmon PID as 1732"
Jul 25 22:28:26 horizon podman[1334]: 2024-07-25 22:28:26.340637017 +0200 CEST m=+1.258519518 container init 65accc2c8b101561b05289a5d86dc9f01a5a67a6c701d87f148b9c98f6c869fb (image=localhost/freeradius-container_radius-server:latest, n>
Jul 25 22:28:26 horizon podman[1334]: 2024-07-25 22:28:26.34515884 +0200 CEST m=+1.263041341 container start 65accc2c8b101561b05289a5d86dc9f01a5a67a6c701d87f148b9c98f6c869fb (image=localhost/freeradius-container_radius-server:latest, n>
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Set up rootless containers with restart=always
2. `loginctl enable-linger && systemctl --user enable podman-restart.service`
3. Reboot the machine


### Describe the results you received

The containers do not start after rebooting. podman-restart.service is marked as failed. When manually entering `systemctl --user restart podman-restart`, the issue goes away.

### Describe the results you expected

The containers start after rebooting

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Arch Linux with `dhcpcd` for networking

### Additional information

I personally suspect the issue is because network-online.target (after which `podman-restart.service` is scheduled) comes up too early with dhcpcd.

comments.body:
> I personally suspect the issue is because network-online.target (after which podman-restart.service is scheduled) comes up too early with dhcpcd.

If that's the case, this is the same as https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/22197 (still open). Can you have a look at the workarounds mentioned there, https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/22197#issuecomment-2096967107 and following, and see if they work for you?
yes let's close this as dup of #22197
